# ToolAdvisor

ToolAdvisor is a brand-neutral cutting tool advisor for machinists, CNC programmers and manufacturing engineers.

Primary pages:

- https://tooladvisor.eu/ - Advisor landing page and AI assistant entry point
- https://tooladvisor.eu/catalog - Canonical cutting tool catalog with ISO material and tool-family filters
- https://tooladvisor.eu/cross-reference - Insert cross-reference workflow for equivalent tool codes
- https://tooladvisor.eu/compare - Side-by-side technical comparison matrix
- https://tooladvisor.eu/knowledge - Engineering guide library
- https://tooladvisor.eu/contact - Support and engineering contact

Data notes:

- Tool records combine published manufacturer-style fields, reviewed examples and clearly marked estimates.
- Recommendations should be validated against current manufacturer catalog data before production machining.
- ToolAdvisor does not sell manufacturer placement in recommendations.
